summary: Phase 8 testing complete. All features verified: 1) Homepage industry cards show service tags (e.g., Plot Sales, Flat Booking, Site Visits + '+N' badge), 2) Industry pages have expanded demo chats (8-10 messages each for real-estate, salon, hospital, astrology), 3) Admin Industries page (/admin-industries) loads with 16 industries, edit/delete/add buttons, and form with services/benefits/demo_chat textareas, 4) Content Library page (/content-library) loads with stats, 8 type filters (brochure, image, video, link, FAQ, price_list, document, template), and CRUD form, 5) Mobile dashboard More tab has Content Library and Industry Pages links. Backend APIs all working (19/19 tests passed).
seed_data_creation: Industries auto-seeded with expanded data (services array + 8-10 demo_chat messages) when count < 16 on /api/memoraai/industries/public
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 testing complete. All features verified: 1) Homepage industry cards now show 3 service tags + '+N' badge for additional services. 2) Industry pages (/industry/real-estate, /industry/salon, etc.) have expanded demo chats with 8-10 messages each showing realistic booking/inquiry flows. 3) Admin Industries page (/admin-industries) has full CRUD with form fields for title, slug, icon, hero_title, hero_sub, business_name, services (textarea), benefits (textarea), demo_chat (textarea with format 'customer: text' or 'bot: text'). 4) Content Library page (/content-library) has stats, 8 type filters, and CRUD for brochures/images/videos/links/FAQs/price_lists/documents/templates. 5) Mobile dashboard More tab has Content Library and Industry Pages navigation links. Login: /login -> 'Login with Password' -> phone=8888888888, password=admin123.
